Manual workflows cost your team 12 hours per engineer per week.

  • 12 hrs/wk spent on repeatable tasks (median, N=210)
  • $28K / engineer / year in fully-loaded time cost
  • 19% velocity tax vs teams with automation
Deep-dive: methodology & raw data >
Source: Internal benchmark of 210 teams, 2025 Q4. Raw dataset in appendix. Pause on the middle stat — it's the one managers haven't seen before.
